stemHtml: For EU aircraft with a Certificate of Airworthiness (CofA) issued before 2019, which of the following criteria must be met for installation of EGPWS/TAWS?

options.a: MTOM of more than 5700 kg and a MOPSC of more than 19
options.b: MTOM of more than 5700 kg and MOPSC of 9 or less.
options.c: MTOM of more than 5700 kg or MOPSC of more than 9.
options.d: MTOM of 5700 kg or less and MOPSC of 19 or less.
